message:
feat(actor,session): complete Phase 3 - Actors and Session Types

Actor module (src/actor.rs):
- Actor trait with on_start/handle/on_stop lifecycle hooks
- ActorHandle with send/stop/join, ActorRef for cloneable sender
- run_actor_loop with cancel check, message recv, mailbox drain, on_stop
- spawn_actor on Scope: two-phase mailbox, CatchUnwind, oneshot result
- spawn_supervised_actor: factory restarts, Erlang-style crash recovery
  (reports panics as Outcome::err so restart policy applies)
- 4 E2E tests: message processing, drain on cancel, supervised restart,
  deterministic replay

Session types (src/session.rs):
- Core AST: Send<T,Next>, Recv<T,Next>, Choose<A,B>, Offer<A,B>, End
- Session trait with involutive Dual associated type
- Typed Endpoint<S> over two-phase mpsc channels (Box<dyn Any+Send>)
- Affine send/recv/choose_left/choose_right/offer/close operations
- 11 unit tests + 3 compile_fail doc tests for protocol violations

Closes: asupersync-0cd (Phase 3 epic), 0cd.1-4, 0cd.1.1-1.3,
0cd.2.1-2.2, 0cd.3.1-3.3, 0cd.4.1
Unblocks: asupersync-tmh (Phase 4) and 10 downstream items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
